demoNote: Guest mode loads a demo portfolio; you can clear it anytime
gestureHint: Tip: pinch to zoom, drag to pan the period (mouse wheel on desktop)
cmpPh: Enter a ticker, e.g. VT, 0700, QQQ…
locFilterHint: Only selected locations are included in value & returns
demoDataHint: Load or clear the demo portfolio
deleteAcctConfirm: Deleting your account permanently removes all your data and cannot be undone. Enter your password to confirm:
disclaimer: Demo platform with simulated data. Not investment advice.
noHoldings: No holdings yet. Tap “＋ Add” to enter your first trade.
perfHint: Portfolio TWR vs major indices over the same period
perfNote: Indices are adjusted-price total return, for reference only
guruHint: Data from US SEC 13F public filings
privacyHint: When on, amounts are hidden by default after each login; tap the total net assets anytime to toggle show/hide
plModeHint: Default P/L shown under the total card
shareHint: Generate a card with returns only, no amounts
shareNote: This snapshot contains returns only — no amounts — safe to share.
shareDisclaimer: For reference only, not investment advice
newsDisclaimer: News is aggregated from third-party sources. This app provides headline indexing and links only — it does not reproduce article content. Copyright belongs to the original publishers; tapping a headline opens the source.
emptyWelcome: Welcome to WealthLens! Add your first transaction, or load the demo portfolio to explore.
delAllOfSym: Delete all txns of this asset
confirmDelAll: Delete ALL transactions of {sym}? This cannot be undone
guestMode: Guest mode (data stays on this device)
verifyTitle: A verification code was sent to your email; enter it within 15 minutes
codeTooMany: Too many attempts, please register again
mailFailed: Failed to send email, try again later
expHint: Fees/liabilities are deducted from cash and naturally reduce returns (not external flows)
autoDivNote: Estimated dividend auto-booked by the system; editing converts it to a manual record
confirmDelAutoDiv: This is an auto-booked dividend (derived from a holding). After deletion, recalculation will not regenerate it. Delete?
confirmEditAutoDiv: Editing converts this dividend to a MANUAL record; future recalculation will not overwrite it (including auto-adjustment when holdings change). Prefer auto-dividends to stay in sync. Continue?
transferHint: Move part of a holding from one location to another (neutral internal transfer; no P/L or return impact). From the transfer date, each location computes its own subsequent dividends.
transferSameLoc: Source and destination are the same
moveLocWithDiv: You changed this holding's location (from {from} to {to}). Move all auto-dividends of this symbol at {from} to {to} as well? (Manual dividend records are not moved.)
manualDivWarn: Please confirm the system has not already auto-booked this dividend (holdings with a matching ex-date are booked automatically). Auto-dividends adjust when holdings change; manual entries must be maintained yourself. Add manually anyway?
autoDivHint: Booked on ex-date based on holdings (editable per entry)
divTaxHint: Auto dividends are booked net of tax; default 0%
customSrcWarn: This is a custom third-party source; data may break if the target site changes.
customSrcDesc: Provide an API URL plus JSONPath for dates/prices to track any fund, bond or product. After saving, use the symbol directly in transactions.
csvHint: Export a backup, or import from brokers/other apps
importReplaceQ: OK = replace all existing transactions; Cancel = merge.
needLive: Requires live-data mode (open via the server)
divHint: Dividends/interest are added to cash and reflected in TWR/MWR (not treated as external flows)
